target_property: Frame rail aft vertical-web hole positional tolerances, flatness, and hole edge-distance limits
system_context: Rear structural battery cradle mounting interface (feeds L3 PROP-BATTERY-AFT; does not invent L1 geometry)
inference_forbidden_reason: Hole positional tolerances and edge distances cannot be inferred from tank capacity or frame outside width.
engineering_risk: Pre-machined cradle mismatch, fastener shear, hole ovalization under fatigue.

best_source_tiers.source_class: On-chassis CMM / portable arm metrology on physical mule
best_source_tiers.notes: Physical asset intake required; AJR before purchase of metrology services/assets

honesty_notes: Operator 'Estimated Hours Saved' and 'Confidence Gain' are L2/L3 planning metadata — not L1 truth.
Blocking level labels are project management only.
Complements MEPQ-004 (hole centers/torque); this node focuses on tolerance/flatness/edge distance.
